description: You are a research astronomer maintaining a coordinate transformation library 'astro_coords' at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/astro_coords. The observatory's automated pointing system has been failing because the library is producing incorrect sky coordinates. Identify and fix four distinct mathematical bugs in the 'coords/' directory affecting galactic coordinates, horizontal coordinates, angular separation, and HMS parsing. Ensure all tests pass without modifying the test or data files.

bug_descriptions: equatorial_to_galactic: NGP declination in degrees not converted to radians
equatorial_to_horizontal: atan2 arguments swapped for azimuth
angular_separation: cosine term uses addition instead of subtraction
hms_to_degrees: seconds divided by 60 instead of 3600
